creator: graham@menhennitt.com.au
text:
Well it still doesn't work for me as at rev 378589 (2.4.17).

% cat /var/db/ports/sysutils_dar/options

OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=GCRYPT
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=LZO
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=NLS
